title: trifolium kingii
intro: Trifolium kingii, also known as King's clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the mountainous regions of Western Europe. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of King's clover include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and reduce stress. The herbal preparations of Trifolium kingii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
